title: MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: BROOKINGS MENTAL HEALTH CARE AND SUBSTANCE USE TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of mental health services including mental health evaluations, peer support, individual counseling, and group counseling. 615 5th Street Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (877) 408-8941 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 408-8941 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans and Oregon Health Plan. Sliding scale fee available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Peer Mental Health Support Services Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
